contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Backtester UI iteration — autocomplete, strategy dropdown, date picker, stacked RSI/MACD/barometer panels
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1062
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1063
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1064
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1065
  
  Details:
  Backtester UI iteration on Edgar's /backtest surface (TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer),
  paired session Claude + Gary, building on the initial backtester (#1058/#1060/#1061).
  
  What changed
  - README: documented the backtester + the "fix TICKER" data-quality workflow (#1062).
  - Controls (#1063): restored ticker autocomplete (tagsinput + typeahead -> /compare_search),
    added a strategy dropdown (Compare both / Buy & hold / Rebalance band), single flatpickr
    date-range picker, removed the Capital input (derive total = initial position + equal cash reserve).
  - Reactive controls (#1064): chart re-runs on ticker/strategy/date/param change, not just the button.
  - Stacked indicator panels (#1065): sell-off index moved to its own always-on barometer panel
    (not the equity right-axis), plus per-ticker RSI (30/70 guides) and MACD (line+signal) panels
    from precomputed daily_trades fields; all panels share one aligned date axis.
  
  Why
  Turn the backtester into a usable company-analysis surface: time entries against the market
  correction barometer with RSI/MACD context, on a clean single-axis equity chart.
  
  Pull requests
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1062
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1063
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1064
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1065
  
  Time basis (~60 min): four sequential UI PRs with rspec + worktree-server verification each.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
